attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
USPEBPO.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT,
USPEBPO.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT
,USPEBPO.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT
,'Fiscal Year' AS FISCAL_CALENDAR_CD
,USPEBPO.EXPENSE_FUTURE_PUBLICATION_DT
,USPEBPO.COMPANY_CD
,USPEBPO.DEPARTMENT_CD
,USPEBPO.FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD
,NCOA.BK_FIN_ACCT_LOCALITY_INT AS BK_FIN_ACCT_LOCALITY_INT
,(USPEBPO.BUDGET_AMOUNT * 1000) AS USD_BUDGET_AT_ACTUAL_RATE_AMT
,(USPEBPO.BUDGET_AMOUNT * 1000) * (EFRP.CONVERSION_RATE) AS FUNCTIONAL_BUDGET_AMT
,(USPEBPO.BUDGET_AMOUNT * 1000) AS USD_BUDGET_AMT
,EECSM.CURRENCY_CODE AS FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD
FROM
		(
		SELECT
		  SPEBP.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT ,
	      SPEBP.FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT   as BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT ,
	      SPEBP.FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT as BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT  ,
	      SPEBP.REFRESH_DATE as EXPENSE_FUTURE_PUBLICATION_DT  ,
	      SPEBP.COMPANY_CD ,
	      SPEBP.DEPARTMENT_CD ,
	      SPEBP.FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD ,
	      SPEBP.BUDGET_AMOUNT 
	      FROM 
		$$STGDB.WI_ST_PL_EXPN_BUD_PUB SPEBP
	union all
	  SELECT 
		EPEBP.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT ,
	      EPEBP.FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT   as BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT ,
	      EPEBP.FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT as BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT  ,
	      cast(  EPEBP.REFRESH_DATE  as date) as EXPENSE_FUTURE_PUBLICATION_DT  ,
	      EPEBP.COMPANY_CD ,
	      EPEBP.DEPARTMENT_CD ,
	      EPEBP.FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD ,
	      EPEBP.BUDGET_AMOUNT 
		FROM
		$$EXCEPDB.EX_PL_EXPN_BUD_PUBLISH EPEBP
   ) USPEBPO
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS NCOA
   on  NCOA.BK_CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS_ID_INT=50258
INNER  JOIN 
	(SELECT 
		EECSM1.COMPANY, 
		EECSM1.CURRENCY_CODE,
		NFM.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT*100+NFM.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT
			FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_ED_COMPANY_SOURCE_MAP EECSM1,	$$COMREFVWDB.N_FISCAL_MONTH NFM
			WHERE FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT BETWEEN EECSM1.START_FISCAL_PERIOD_ID AND EECSM1.END_FISCAL_PERIOD_ID
			AND (EECSM1.COMPANY ,EECSM1.END_FISCAL_PERIOD_ID)
			NOT IN 
			(SELECT  EECSM2.COMPANY ,EECSM2.END_FISCAL_PERIOD_ID
			FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_ED_COMPANY_SOURCE_MAP EECSM2
			GROUP BY  EECSM2.COMPANY,EECSM2.END_FISCAL_PERIOD_ID
			HAVING COUNT(1)>1)
	GROUP BY EECSM1.COMPANY,EECSM1.CURRENCY_CODE,FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT
	UNION ALL
	SELECT 
		EECSM1.COMPANY, 
		EECSM1.CURRENCY_CODE,
		NFM.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT*100+NFM.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT
			FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_ED_COMPANY_SOURCE_MAP EECSM1,	$$COMREFVWDB.N_FISCAL_MONTH NFM
			WHERE FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT BETWEEN EECSM1.START_FISCAL_PERIOD_ID AND EECSM1.END_FISCAL_PERIOD_ID
			AND (EECSM1.COMPANY ,EECSM1.END_FISCAL_PERIOD_ID)
			IN 
			(SELECT  EECSM2.COMPANY ,EECSM2.END_FISCAL_PERIOD_ID
			FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_ED_COMPANY_SOURCE_MAP EECSM2
			GROUP BY  EECSM2.COMPANY,EECSM2.END_FISCAL_PERIOD_ID
			HAVING COUNT(1)>1)
			AND EECSM1.GLOBAL_NAME ='US'
	GROUP BY EECSM1.COMPANY,EECSM1.CURRENCY_CODE,FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT
	) EECSM
ON(USPEBPO.COMPANY_CD=EECSM.COMPANY
	AND EECSM.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT =USPEBPO.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT )
LEFT OUTER JOIN 
	(SELECT * FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_PL_FX_RATE_PUBLISH 
	 WHERE (FISCAL_MONTH_ID,CURRENCY_CODE,REFRESH_DATE)
	     IN (SELECT FISCAL_MONTH_ID,CURRENCY_CODE,MAX(REFRESH_DATE) REFRESH_DATE
	          FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_PL_FX_RATE_PUBLISH GROUP BY FISCAL_MONTH_ID,CURRENCY_CODE)
	) EFRP
 ON(  EECSM.CURRENCY_CODE=EFRP.CURRENCY_CODE
	AND USPEBPO.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT=EFRP.FISCAL_MONTH_ID )
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FINANCIAL_DEPARTMENT NFD
	ON ( USPEBPO.COMPANY_CD= NFD.BK_COMPANY_CODE 
		AND USPEBPO.DEPARTMENT_CD = NFD.BK_DEPARTMENT_CODE )
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT NFA
	ON USPEBPO.FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD = NFA.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE

SELECT
EXCEP.BATCH_ID   ,                   
EXCEP.DEPT_ID    ,                   
EXCEP.ACCOUNT_ID   ,                 
EXCEP.FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT ,      
EXCEP.FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT ,       
EXCEP.BUDGET_AMOUNT   ,              
EXCEP.REFRESH_DATE ,                 
EXCEP.CREATE_DATETIME ,              
EXCEP.ACTION_CODE    ,               
EXCEP.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT,      
EXCEP.COMPANY_CD      ,              
EXCEP.DEPARTMENT_CD  ,               
EXCEP.FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD    ,      
'RI' EXCEPTION_TYPE                
FROM $$STGDB.WI_ST_PL_EXPN_BUD_PUB EXCEP
WHERE
NOT EXISTS( SELECT 1 FROM  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FINANCIAL_DEPARTMENT NFD
	                 WHERE 	 EXCEP.COMPANY_CD= NFD.BK_COMPANY_CODE         
	  		     AND EXCEP.DEPARTMENT_CD = NFD.BK_DEPARTMENT_CODE)
OR NOT EXISTS( SELECT 1 FROM  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT NFA
	               WHERE EXCEP.FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD= NFA.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE)
OR NOT EXISTS( SELECT 1 FROM  (
					SELECT EECSM1.END_FISCAL_PERIOD_ID,EECSM1.COMPANY,EECSM1.CURRENCY_CODE FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_ED_COMPANY_SOURCE_MAP EECSM1
					WHERE (EECSM1.COMPANY ,EECSM1.END_FISCAL_PERIOD_ID)
					NOT IN 
					(SELECT  EECSM2.COMPANY ,EECSM2.END_FISCAL_PERIOD_ID
					FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_ED_COMPANY_SOURCE_MAP EECSM2
					GROUP BY  EECSM2.COMPANY,EECSM2.END_FISCAL_PERIOD_ID
					HAVING COUNT(1)>1)
					UNION ALL
					SELECT EECSM1.END_FISCAL_PERIOD_ID,EECSM1.COMPANY,EECSM1.CURRENCY_CODE FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_ED_COMPANY_SOURCE_MAP EECSM1
					WHERE (EECSM1.COMPANY ,EECSM1.END_FISCAL_PERIOD_ID)
					IN 
					(SELECT  EECSM2.COMPANY ,EECSM2.END_FISCAL_PERIOD_ID
					FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_ED_COMPANY_SOURCE_MAP EECSM2
					GROUP BY  EECSM2.COMPANY,EECSM2.END_FISCAL_PERIOD_ID
					HAVING COUNT(1)>1)
					AND GLOBAL_NAME ='US'
					) EECSM,  $$ETLVWDB.EL_PL_FX_RATE_PUBLISH EFRP
	                WHERE EXCEP.COMPANY_CD=EECSM.COMPANY
	                     AND EECSM.CURRENCY_CODE=EFRP.CURRENCY_CODE
	                     AND EXCEP.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT = EFRP.FISCAL_MONTH_ID )

SELECT
	USPEBP.BATCH_ID	
,USPEBP.DEPT_ID
	,USPEBP.ACCOUNT_ID
	,USPEBP.FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT 	
	,NFY.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT	
	,USPEBP.BUDGET_AMOUNT	
	,CAST (USPEBP.REFRESH_DATE AS DATE)	
	,USPEBP.CREATE_DATETIME	
	,USPEBP.ACTION_CODE	
	,(NFY.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT*100)+USPEBP.FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT AS DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT	
	,SUBSTR(USPEBP.DEPT_ID,2,3) AS COMPANY_CD	
	,SUBSTR(USPEBP.DEPT_ID,5) AS DEPARTMENT_CD
	,SUBSTR(USPEBP.ACCOUNT_ID,2) AS ACCOUNT_ID
	FROM
	(
		SELECT 
		1 AS FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT 
		,SPEBP.DEPT_ID
		,SPEBP.ACCOUNT_ID
		,SPEBP.M1 AS BUDGET_AMOUNT
		,SPEBP.REFRESH_DATE
		,SPEBP.BATCH_ID
		,SPEBP.CREATE_DATETIME
		,SPEBP.ACTION_CODE
		FROM
		$$STGDB.ST_PL_EXPN_BUD_PUBLISH SPEBP 
		UNION ALL
		SELECT 
		2 AS FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT 
		,SPEBP.DEPT_ID
		,SPEBP.ACCOUNT_ID
		,SPEBP.M2 AS BUDGET_AMOUNT
		,SPEBP.REFRESH_DATE
		,SPEBP.BATCH_ID
		,SPEBP.CREATE_DATETIME
		,SPEBP.ACTION_CODE
		FROM
		$$STGDB.ST_PL_EXPN_BUD_PUBLISH SPEBP 
		UNION ALL
		SELECT 
		3 AS FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT 
		,SPEBP.DEPT_ID
		,SPEBP.ACCOUNT_ID
		,SPEBP.M3 AS BUDGET_AMOUNT
		,SPEBP.REFRESH_DATE
		,SPEBP.BATCH_ID
		,SPEBP.CREATE_DATETIME
		,SPEBP.ACTION_CODE
		FROM
		$$STGDB.ST_PL_EXPN_BUD_PUBLISH SPEBP 
		UNION ALL
		SELECT 
		4 AS FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT 
		,SPEBP.DEPT_ID
		,SPEBP.ACCOUNT_ID
		,SPEBP.M4 AS BUDGET_AMOUNT
		,SPEBP.REFRESH_DATE
		,SPEBP.BATCH_ID
		,SPEBP.CREATE_DATETIME
		,SPEBP.ACTION_CODE
		FROM
		$$STGDB.ST_PL_EXPN_BUD_PUBLISH SPEBP 
		UNION ALL
		SELECT 
		5 AS FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT 
		,SPEBP.DEPT_ID
		,SPEBP.ACCOUNT_ID
		,SPEBP.M5 AS BUDGET_AMOUNT
		,SPEBP.REFRESH_DATE
		,SPEBP.BATCH_ID
		,SPEBP.CREATE_DATETIME
		,SPEBP.ACTION_CODE
		FROM
		$$STGDB.ST_PL_EXPN_BUD_PUBLISH SPEBP 
		UNION ALL
		SELECT 
		6 AS FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT 
		,SPEBP.DEPT_ID
		,SPEBP.ACCOUNT_ID
		,SPEBP.M6 AS BUDGET_AMOUNT
		,SPEBP.REFRESH_DATE
		,SPEBP.BATCH_ID
		,SPEBP.CREATE_DATETIME
		,SPEBP.ACTION_CODE
		FROM
		$$STGDB.ST_PL_EXPN_BUD_PUBLISH SPEBP 
		UNION ALL
		SELECT 
		7 AS FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT 
		,SPEBP.DEPT_ID
		,SPEBP.ACCOUNT_ID
		,SPEBP.M7 AS BUDGET_AMOUNT
		,SPEBP.REFRESH_DATE
		,SPEBP.BATCH_ID
		,SPEBP.CREATE_DATETIME
		,SPEBP.ACTION_CODE
		FROM
		$$STGDB.ST_PL_EXPN_BUD_PUBLISH SPEBP 
		UNION ALL
		SELECT 
		8 AS FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT 
		,SPEBP.DEPT_ID
		,SPEBP.ACCOUNT_ID
		,SPEBP.M8 AS BUDGET_AMOUNT
		,SPEBP.REFRESH_DATE
		,SPEBP.BATCH_ID
		,SPEBP.CREATE_DATETIME
		,SPEBP.ACTION_CODE
		FROM
		$$STGDB.ST_PL_EXPN_BUD_PUBLISH SPEBP 
		UNION ALL
		SELECT 
		9 AS FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT
		,SPEBP.DEPT_ID
		,SPEBP.ACCOUNT_ID
		,SPEBP.M9 AS BUDGET_AMOUNT
		,SPEBP.REFRESH_DATE
		,SPEBP.BATCH_ID
		,SPEBP.CREATE_DATETIME
		,SPEBP.ACTION_CODE
		FROM
		$$STGDB.ST_PL_EXPN_BUD_PUBLISH SPEBP 
		UNION ALL
		SELECT 
		10 AS FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT 
		,SPEBP.DEPT_ID
		,SPEBP.ACCOUNT_ID
		,SPEBP.M10 AS BUDGET_AMOUNT
		,SPEBP.REFRESH_DATE
		,SPEBP.BATCH_ID
		,SPEBP.CREATE_DATETIME
		,SPEBP.ACTION_CODE
		FROM
		$$STGDB.ST_PL_EXPN_BUD_PUBLISH SPEBP 
		UNION ALL
		SELECT 
		11 AS FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT 
		,SPEBP.DEPT_ID
		,SPEBP.ACCOUNT_ID
		,SPEBP.M11 AS BUDGET_AMOUNT
		,SPEBP.REFRESH_DATE
		,SPEBP.BATCH_ID
		,SPEBP.CREATE_DATETIME
		,SPEBP.ACTION_CODE
		FROM
		$$STGDB.ST_PL_EXPN_BUD_PUBLISH SPEBP 
		UNION ALL
		SELECT 
		12 AS FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT 
		,SPEBP.DEPT_ID
		,SPEBP.ACCOUNT_ID
		,SPEBP.M12 AS BUDGET_AMOUNT
		,SPEBP.REFRESH_DATE
		,SPEBP.BATCH_ID
		,SPEBP.CREATE_DATETIME
		,SPEBP.ACTION_CODE
		FROM
		$$STGDB.ST_PL_EXPN_BUD_PUBLISH SPEBP
	) USPEBP,
		$$COMREFVWDB.N_FISCAL_YEAR NFY WHERE CAST (USPEBP.REFRESH_DATE AS DATE) BETWEEN NFY.FISCAL_YEAR_START_DATE AND NFY.FISCAL_YEAR_END_DATE
